zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Olive Calver於1509年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比時，她的父親Sir Knight Walter Calverly9歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Drakes22歲。她於1536年與Henry John Alden在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史盧比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1590年在英國哈普爾素坦普頓享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Olive Calver于1509年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比时，她的父亲Sir Knight Walter Calverly9岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Drakes22岁。她于1536年与Henry John Alden在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史盧比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1590年在英国哈普爾素坦普頓享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Calver in Derbyshire, named in Old English with calf ‘calf’ + ofer ‘slope, ridge’.
possibly from Middle English calver ‘flecky-fleshed (of salmon)’, perhaps a nickname for someone with white flecks in their hair or mottled skin.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

nameMeanings.name: Olive
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval given name, Oliff(e), derived via French from the Late Latin name Oliva, which was borne by two obscure early saints. It in turn is derived from the Latin name for the olive tree, and was no doubt adopted at first because of the associations of the olive tree with peaceful productivity and fruitfulness; the olive branch has been a symbol of peace since biblical times. Like many names denoting plants and flowers, it was particularly popular in the early decades of the 20th century. See also Olivia .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Olive Calver was born in 1509, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Knight Walter Calverly, was 9 and her mother, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, was 22. She married Henry John Alden in 1536, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1590, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Olive Calver est née en 1509, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knight Walter Calverly, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry John Alden en 1536, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1590, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Olive Calverが1509年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Walter Calverlyは9歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Drakesは22歳であった。1536年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスクルービーでHenry John Aldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1590年にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude Olive Calver(이)가 1509년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight Walter Calverly(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Drakes(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 Henry John Alden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Henry John Alden em 1536, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Olive Calver родилась в 1509 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Knight Walter Calverly было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Drakes, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry John Alden в 1536 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1590 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.
